title: MTReports
description: A simple to use report management system!
body: Full transcript MTReports Simplifying server reports with easy prompts for players and admins! SIMPLIFIED REPORTS Simplify the reporting process with intuitive GUI In-Game! Easily report a player In-Game by choosing a specific reason from a nice looking GUI PERSONALIZED REPORTS Your reason isn’t listed? No worries, you can report a player with your own reason /report MaxOne He some how broke into the house and took all my valueables /report ItzXMat He is using cursed words in DMs /report Guy19 He is trying to ban evade. Report rule breakers using your own words! Making it easy to communicate issues. REPORT HANDLING Admins can easily handle player reports through a simple and quick GUI Efficiently manage player reports through a simple GUI Accept, Decline or Discard! PERFORMANCE Seamless integration with your server for a smooth reporting experience. Compatible with versionsfrom 1.8 to 1.20! Easily get rid of rule breakers with MTReports
